detail.description:
Once again, a story connected to you.
The super-hit animated RPG "Exotic Princess Link Re:Dive" kicks off a new generation!

◆Embellish wonderful stories with beautiful animations
A large number of high-standard animations produced by the famous Japanese animation production team "WIT STUDIO".
Bringing the dramatic tension and effects of authentic Japanese animation!
With the blessing of moving music produced by Japan's god-level animation music composer "Tanaka Hiroshi", you can immerse yoursel
detail.recentChanges:
．公會小屋BGM更新
．調整了部份UI
．戰鬥選單功能擴充
．轉蛋系統優化，變更了部份轉蛋的UI界面與新增兌換系統
．當「傷害提升」增加時，若單次攻擊動作所造成的傷害超過一定數值，最終造成的傷害將根據該效果量進一步提升。 由「傷害提升」所增加的傷害量設有上限。

eventMentions.text: 更新完開遊戲要下載，點了就不動了，完全進不去
i really love thos game but with the recent update. it keeps crashing for no reason, especially andr
one of the best mobile game, character design, event and music are great~
更新安卓12之後一直閃退，無法進行遊戲。進入關卡之後都會卡loading畫面，希望趕快改善。
遊戲體驗很好 但是要忍受大量外掛玩家，對正常玩家是很不公平 外掛是異常地猖獗，不少低玩家等級能全破最新內容 回報之後也不一定鎖帳號，只得到公式範本回覆

inferredReasons.label: 🎉 限時活動引流
inferredReasons.detail: 評論中 5 次提及活動/事件
